reviewer: hand-reviewed (Opus) — headless first-visit drive with real inference, cross-lingual matrix + search verification, mobile+desktop overflow matrix, modern-web-guidance consulted

rubric.evidence: Headless first-visit drive (fresh profile, WASM, no GPU): clicked Download (~98 MB) → state 'ready' in 28s → clicked Embed → a real 7x7 cosine matrix rendered (49 cells, 140 ms, 384-d). Standalone CDN verification of the same model (transformers.js 3.7.5, feature-extraction, q8) gave related-EN cos 0.807 vs unrelated 0.621; cross-lingual EN↔FR 0.823. 0 console errors. Real onnx-community/granite-embedding-97m-multilingual-r2-ONNX pipeline runs in models/granite-embedding-multilingual/worker.js.
rubric.notes: ModernBERT backbone loads and runs under transformers.js 3.7.5 (WASM q8). Mean pooling (Granite's trained pooling) verified to separate related from unrelated and to align translations.

rubric.evidence: Output is a fixed-length 384-d numeric vector per input (readout shows dims 384). Cross-lingual panel: EN/FR/ES/DE/JA translations of one sentence scored 0.86-0.91 against each other and 0.54-0.59 against an unrelated control — semantically correct shape + values.
rubric.notes: L2-normalized so cosine = dot product; worker returns pre-norm magnitude for the 'see inside' surface.

rubric.evidence: At-a-glance links the exact source model id (onnx-community/granite-embedding-97m-multilingual-r2-ONNX) and the IBM base repo, names task feature-extraction, backend WASM, dtype q8, pooling mean, license Apache-2.0. Readout shows real backend (WASM) + latency.

Uses the shared createModelLoader (lib/model-loader.js). Fresh profile showed 'Download model (~98 MB)' (absent state, no auto-download); after download it auto-inits on return. Per-model clear-cache + storage handled by the shared loader.

Checking → downloading (% progress) → ready surfaced via role=status aria-live; embed/search/cross-lingual each show status + error text on failure (rowStatus / cmpStatus). Retry path via the shared loader.
rubric.notes: Offline-cached and partial-cache states inherit the shared loader behavior; not separately screenshotted this pass.

rubric.evidence: Every control driven headless: Embed & compare (matrix + PCA), Reset examples, Search (cross-lingual German query ranked the password passages correctly), Show cross-lingual matrix, inspect-vector select. Labels + aria-live present.
All numbers are computed from real embeddings (cosine matrix, PCA, k-means, search ranking). No canned results; absent model shows Download, never a fabricated matrix.

role=status aria-live regions for load + run; labelled inputs/selects; matrix uses th scope=row/col; buttons >=40px. Design-system focus + WCAG-AA colours (light+dark). Consulted the accessibility guide.
rubric.notes: The dense sim-matrix conveys value via number + background; colour is not the sole channel (cells show the numeric cosine).

rubric.evidence: Mobile 360x740 DPR3 + desktop 1280x800: 0px horizontal overflow on the index and all 4 use-case pages (measured document scrollWidth - clientWidth = 0 after fixing long-model-id cell wrapping: table-layout:fixed + overflow-wrap:anywhere on .inside-table cells and p/li code). Wide matrix + code blocks scroll inside their own overflow-x containers.

Inference + tokenization run in models/granite-embedding-multilingual/worker.js (off the main thread); only light vector maths (cosine, PCA, k-means over a handful of 384-d vectors) runs on the main thread. Embed latency 140 ms; page stayed responsive during the ~98 MB first-visit download. INP-safe.

guidanceConsulted.query: run heavy inference off the main thread without blocking INP
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Yield / offload heavy synchronous work (loops, model inference) so it doesn't block the main thread and spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — feature-extraction + tokenization run in the dedicated module worker; the multi-model rung adds the built bge-reranker worker; only cheap vector maths runs on the main thread.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: First-visit drive stayed responsive during the ~98 MB download and matrix render; 0 console errors.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel and data tables without horizontal overflow on mobile
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use intrinsic sizing + wrapping (grid auto-fit/minmax, flex-wrap) and contain wide content; prevent unbreakable tokens from forcing overflow.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — grid-2 uses repeat(auto-fit,minmax()); the glance table uses table-layout:fixed with overflow-wrap:anywhere so long model ids wrap; the similarity matrix and code blocks scroll inside overflow-x:auto containers.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: Mobile document overflow went from 33px (long model-id cell) to 0px after the wrapping fix; verified across index + 4 use-case pages.

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible loading status and labelled controls with live regions
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Expose loading/progress/error via role=status aria-live; label every control; give tables header scope; keep colour off the sole information channel.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live on load + run status; labelled inputs/selects/buttons; matrix th scope; numeric cosine shown in-cell (colour is redundant).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: Headless drive reached ready + rendered results with 0 console errors; contrast from the shared WCAG-AA design system (light+dark).

openQuestions: Should the cross-lingual panel let the user type their own parallel sentence set to test alignment on their domain?
Would exposing the Matryoshka truncation (shorter vectors) be a useful 'see inside' knob for this model?

followUpGoals.goal: Add a 'multilingual clustering at scale' wild demo: paste ~30 mixed-language snippets and colour the PCA map by detected language vs by topic cluster to show meaning beats language.
Add a cross-lingual dedup practical rung that flags near-duplicate pairs ACROSS languages (EN policy vs its ZH translation) above a threshold.

summary: Genuinely new, distinct family (IBM Granite Embedding r2, ModernBERT backbone) verified running real, semantically-correct multilingual embeddings on-device (WASM q8, ~98 MB). Cross-lingual alignment and cross-lingual search both demonstrated with real numbers. Mobile+desktop 0px overflow after a targeted table-wrapping fix; off-main-thread; honest Download state. Not a relabel of any built embedder.
